name: boltz-compute-cli
description: Codex plugin for Boltz Compute that gives agents CLI-backed setup and workflows for structure prediction, protein and small-molecule screening, de novo protein and small-molecule design, and recovery of job status and downloadable results. Workflow skills invoke the boltz-api Go CLI directly; no Python runtime or SDK install is required.

interface.shortDescription: Run Boltz Compute structure prediction, screening, design, and job-recovery workflows via the boltz-api CLI.
interface.longDescription: Provides seven Codex skills around the boltz-api Go CLI: CLI setup/authentication, structure and binding prediction, small-molecule library screening, small-molecule design, protein library screening, protein binder design, and job-status recovery. Workflow skills author a YAML or JSON request body, run estimate-cost and then start, and launch download-results in Codex's managed long-running shell session so polling and artifact download happen in one idempotent resumable step. Results land under ./boltz-experiments/<run-name>/ by default (override via BOLTZ_COMPUTE_OUTPUT_DIR).
defaultPrompt: Screen this compound library against my target protein and rank the hits.
Design peptide, nanobody, or antibody binders for this target epitope.
Help me install or authenticate the boltz-api CLI.
Check my Boltz jobs, tell me what finished, and download the results.
